ir_specs.statement: When copying to a symbolic link, cp follows the link only when it refers to an existing regular file.

ir_specs.statement: However, when copying to a dangling symbolic link, cp refuses by default, and fails with a diagnostic, since the operation is inherently dangerous.

ir_specs.statement: Set POSIXLY_CORRECT to make cp attempt to create the target of a dangling destination symlink, in spite of the possible risk.

ir_specs.statement: Also, when an option like --backup or --link acts to rename or remove the destination before copying, cp renames or removes the symbolic link rather than the file it points to.
